description:
Presenting iPartner pro, an app for entrepreneurs who want to work and earn on their own terms. No timelines, no targets. Registration, certification, sales & commissions – all on a single platform for you.

Work kahin bhi, kabhi bhi! Download the iPartner pro app now.

Download on the app store- https://apps.apple.com/in/app/ipartner-pro/id1589043830

Get it on Google Play- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.icicilombard.ipartnerpro

#ICICILombard #iPartnerPro 

 

Know more about ICICI Lombard - https://www.icicilombard.com

Know more about becoming a PoSP - https://www.icicilombard.com/become-posp-insurance-agent

Insurance agent vs PoSP - https://www.icicilombard.com/insurance-agent-vs-posp

chapters.title: Join us as a digital insurance advisor Point of Sales Person (POSP)
